issues.description: Action should be 'GiveDon' not 'AttachDon'. The card text says 'Give up to 1 rested DON!! card' which means transferring DON from one source to the target, not attaching DON to a character. 'AttachDon' is for generating/creating new DON on a character.

Target scope 'ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader' is incorrect. The card gives DON 'to its owner's Leader or 1 of their Characters' - this refers to the opponent's Leader or Characters, not the activating player's. Target should be 'ChooseOpponentCharacterOrLeader'.
